zh.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Fackert是Maria Gertrud Weber的女兒，於大約1651年出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 維德雷斯多福。她於1674年與Hans Peter Kalhl在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 維德梅爾斯巴賀結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1719年6月15日在德國海因里希_海普洛文次維德雷斯多福享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Fackert是Maria Gertrud Weber的女儿，于大约1651年出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 維德雷斯多福。她于1674年与Hans Peter Kalhl在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 維德梅爾斯巴賀结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1719年6月15日在德国海因里希_海普洛文次維德雷斯多福享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fackert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Markwardt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Gerhardt.

North German: occupational name for a frontier guard or the guardian of a fenced-off area (such as a woodland), Middle Low German markward, from mark ‘boundary’ + ward(e) ‘guardian’. In medieval folk stories Markwart occurs as a nickname for a jay; it is possible that this use may have influenced the acquisition of the surname in some cases.
German: from the personal name Markward(t), composed of the elements mark ‘boundary’ + ward ‘guardian’. Compare Marquardt .

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: A name corrpted from Hannah, q.v. It is also found several times in a male name. From Ann, Anne, we have as nicknames Nan and Nancy

nameMeanings.name: Maria
meanings: A name derived from Mapia, one of the Greek forms of Miriam. Maria is found as a male name as well as a female name. Viscount Montague, of Cowdray, Sussex, who succeeded to the title as second viscount, was christened Anthony Maria Browne. In Camden's Remains (p. 44), referred to in Delicie Literarise, occurs Thomas Maria Wingfield; and there was also a Sir Edward Maria Wingfield. The name appears to have been adopted in the latter family from Mary, daughter of Henry VIII. Compare Notes and Queries 5th S. ii. 73, 316, 478. Marie is frequently found as a male name in France and in other parts of the Continent.

en.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Fackert was born about 1651, in Rengsdorf, Neuwied, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany as the daughter of Maria Gertrud Weber. She married Hans Peter Kalhl in 1674, in Melsbach, Neuwied, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 15 June 1719, in Rengsdorf, Neuwied, Rhineland, Prussia, Germany, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Fackert est née environ 1651, à Rengsdorf, Landkreis Neuwied, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, fille de Maria Gertrud Weber. Elle a épousé Hans Peter Kalhl en 1674, à Melsbach, Landkreis Neuwied, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 juin 1719, à Rengsdorf, Neuwied, Rhénanie, Prusse, Allemagne, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Fackert wurde um 1651 in Rengsdorf, Landkreis Neuwied, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland, als Tochter von Maria Gertrud Weber geboren. Sie hat 1674 in Melsbach, Landkreis Neuwied, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland Hans Peter Kalhl geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. Juni 1719 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Rengsdorf, Neuwied, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Fackert è nata il circa 1651 nel Rengsdorf, Landkreis Neuwied, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania come figlia di Maria Gertrud Weber. Lei sposato Hans Peter Kalhl nel 1674, nel Melsbach, Landkreis Neuwied, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 15 giugno 1719, nel Rengsdorf, Neuwied, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Germania, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Fackertは約1651年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス ネウウィエドレングスドルフでMaria Gertrud Weberの娘として生まれた。1674年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス ネウウィエドメルスバチでHans Peter Kalhlと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1719年6月15日にドイツプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズネウウィエドレングスドルフで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Fackert(은)는 대략 1651년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 니우위드 렌그즈도르프에서 Maria Gertrud Weber의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1674년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 니우위드 멜스바치에서 Hans Peter Kalhl(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1719년 6월 15일 독일 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠 니우위드 렌그즈도르프에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Fackert nasceu aproximadamente 1651, em Rengsdorf, Landkreis Neuwied, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha filha de Maria Gertrud Weber. Ela casou-se com Hans Peter Kalhl em 1674, em Melsbach, Landkreis Neuwied, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 15 de junho de 1719, em Rengsdorf, Neuwied, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Alemanha, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Fackert родилась около 1651 г. в местности ренгсдорф, ландкрис неувиед, раинланд-пфалз, Германия. Её мать звали Maria Gertrud Weber. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hans Peter Kalhl в 1674 г. в местности мелсбач, ландкрис неувиед, раинланд-пфалз, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 15 июня 1719 г. в местности ренгсдорф, неувиед, раинпровинз, Пруссия, Германия в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Fackert nació aproximadamente 1651, en Rengsdorf, Landkreis Neuwied, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania como hija de Maria Gertrud Weber. Se casó con Hans Peter Kalhl en 1674, en Melsbach, Landkreis Neuwied, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 15 de junio de 1719, en Rengsdorf, Neuwied, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Alemania, a la edad de 69 años.
